title: chrysanthemum ferulaceum
intro: Chrysanthemum ferulaceum, also known as the yellow-flowered chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum ferulaceum include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as cough and congestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
